Open Access / Office Hours: DMs Open: Twitter/X — publicly shares investment thesis at khoslaventures.com/blog
Common Pass Reasons: Small market; Incremental improvement (not moonshot); Founder doesn't deeply understand the science; Not enough upside potential [Source: khoslaventures.com/blog, multiple keynotes]
Best Time to Pitch: Best: Q1 (Jan-Mar, new fund year). Pitch after Khosla publishes new thesis on your sector. Avoid: Aug, late Dec. [Source: khoslaventures.com/blog, industry standard]
